scripts.dev: astro build && wrangler pages dev --command="astro dev" --port 4321
scripts.deploy: astro build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute asc --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --local --file=./migrations/0002_albums.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --local --file=./migrations/0003_practice_files.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --local --file=./migrations/0004_admin_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --local --file=./migrations/0005_audio_part_label.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --local --file=./migrations/0006_song_kind_practice_file_song.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute asc --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --remote --file=./migrations/0002_albums.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --remote --file=./migrations/0003_practice_files.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --remote --file=./migrations/0004_admin_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --remote --file=./migrations/0005_audio_part_label.sql && wrangler d1 execute asc --remote --file=./migrations/0006_song_kind_practice_file_song.sql
